title: cyclamen europaeum subsp. ponticum
intro: Cyclamen europaeum subsp. ponticum, a subspecies of the perennial plant Cyclamen europaeum, is a low-growing, herbaceous perennial native to the eastern Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Cyclamen europaeum subsp. ponticum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other medicinal remedies.
